mapper.select: SELECT ld.id, ld.user_id AS userId, ld.category_id AS categoryId, ld.study_time AS studyTime, ld.study_date AS studyDate, ld.created_at AS createdAt, ld.update_at AS updateAt, c.name AS categoryName FROM learning_data ld JOIN categories c ON ld.category_id = c.id WHERE ld.user_id = #{userId} AND ld.study_date >= #{startDate} AND ld.study_date < #{endDate} ORDER BY ld.study_date ASC
